sourcesContent:
import React from "react"; import { Chip } from "@mui/material"; const skills = [ { name: "HTML", emoji: "🌐", color: "#2196F3" }, // Blue { name: "CSS", emoji: "🎨", color: "#E91E63" }, // Pink { name: "JavaScript", emoji: "⚡", color: "#4CAF50" }, // Green { name: "TypeScript", emoji: "🛠️", color: "#00BCD4" }, // Cyan { name: "React", emoji: "⚛️", color: "#3F51B5" }, // Indigo { name: "React Native", emoji: "📱", color: "#673AB7" }, // Deep Purple { name: "Django", emoji: "🐍", color: "#8BC34A" }, // Light Green { name: "Python", emoji: "🐍", color: "#FF9800" }, // Orange { name: "Azure", emoji: "☁️", color: "#03A9F4" }, // Light Blue { name: "Share Hosting", emoji: "📡", color: "#795548" }, // Brown { name: "Digital Ocean", emoji: "🌊", color: "#009688" }, // Teal { name: "Mac", emoji: "🍏", color: "#607D8B" }, // Blue Grey { name: "Windows", emoji: "🖥️", color: "#1E88E5" }, // Dark Blue { name: "Linux", emoji: "🐧", color: "#000000" } // Black ]; export default function Skills() { return (

#skills

{skills.map((skill, index) => (

{skill.emoji}

  • {skill.name}
  • Python JavaScript
))}
); }
